messages.filePanel.title: File
messages.filePanel.empty.title: No file selected
messages.filePanel.empty.withTree.description: Select a file from the project tree to open it in this tab.
messages.filePanel.empty.noTree.description: Open a file, or select text in the terminal to preview as Markdown.
messages.filePanel.image.loadFailed.description: The image could not be loaded or changed after it was opened.
messages.filePanel.image.loadFailed.title: Unable to display image
messages.filePanel.markdown.externalOpenFailed.de: The external link could not be opened.
messages.filePanel.markdown.toc.title: Outline
messages.filePanel.errors.diskDocumentMissing: This saved file could not be restored.
messages.filePanel.errors.deleted: File no longer exists on disk.
messages.filePanel.errors.invalidParams: This file tab could not be restored.
messages.filePanel.errors.outsideWorkspace: This file is outside the current workspace and cannot be restored.
messages.filePanel.errors.read.title: Unable to read file
messages.filePanel.errors.restore.title: Unable to restore file tab
messages.filePanel.errors.save.title: Unable to save file
messages.filePanel.errors.unsupportedOverwrite: This file type cannot be overwritten safely.
messages.filePanel.durability.confirmFailed: Unable to confirm that the file was saved
messages.filePanel.durability.revisionMismatch: The file changed again after it was written. Please check it.
messages.filePanel.saveAll.failed: Some files could not be saved
messages.filePanel.saveAs.overwriteBody: A file already exists at the selected location. Overwrite it?
messages.filePanel.saveAs.rebindFailed: File saved, but it could not be opened in the editor
messages.filePanel.saveAs.recoveryFailed: Unable to resume the interrupted Save As operation
messages.filePanel.saveAs.recoveryTargetChanged: The Save As target changed after the write was interrupted, so it could not be opened automatically. The original draft was kept.
messages.filePanel.saveAs.targetChanged: The selected target changed before it could be written.
messages.filePanel.saveAs.targetDirty: The selected target already has unsaved changes.
messages.filePanel.temporary.missing.title: Temporary file cannot be restored
messages.filePanel.temporary.missing.description: Temporary contents are restored from a local draft when possible, and cleared when the tab closes.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.title: This file cannot be edited
messages.filePanel.unsupported.binary: This is a binary file and cannot be edited as text.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.mixedEol: This file uses mixed line endings. Normalize its line endings before editing.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.tooLarge: This file is too large to edit safely.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.unknownEncoding: This file uses an unsupported or unknown text encoding.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.fileType: This file-system object is not a regular file.
messages.filePanel.unsupported.revealFailed: Unable to show file in file manager
messages.filePanel.unsupported.revealUnavailable: The system file manager did not reveal the file.
messages.filePanel.tree.blockedByDirtyDocument: Save or discard the current file before opening another file from the tree.
messages.filePanel.view.diffUnsupported: Diff view is not enabled yet.
messages.filePanel.view.richUnsupported: Rich Markdown editing is not enabled yet.
messages.files.notifications.noTerminalSelection: Select text in the terminal first
messages.panel.title: Files
messages.panel.noProjectContext.title: No project open
messages.panel.noProjectContext.description: Open a project folder to browse files.
messages.panel.loadError.title: Unable to load files
messages.panel.loading.label: Loading files
messages.panel.empty.title: No files found
messages.panel.empty.description: This project root does not contain files to show.
messages.panel.tree.label: Files
messages.filePanel.tree.pathMustBeRelative: Path must be relative to the parent folder
messages.filePanel.tree.createDurabilityUnknown: File created, but write could not be confirmed
messages.filePanel.tree.createDurabilityMismatch: The new file changed after it was created.
messages.filePanel.tree.noSearchResults.title: No matching files
messages.filePanel.tree.noSearchResults.descripti: Try another file name or path.
messages.filePanel.tree.delete.title: Delete
messages.filePanel.tree.delete.body: Delete “{{name}}”? You can restore it from the system Trash.
messages.filePanel.tree.delete.preserveBody: Keep the current unsaved content as temporary drafts, or discard the changes. Deleted items can be restored from the system Trash.
messages.filePanel.tree.delete.protectedBody: Open files under this path have unsaved changes. Save them before deleting? Deleted items can be restored from the system Trash.
messages.filePanel.tree.delete.protectionFailed: Unable to save drafts for open files
messages.filePanel.conflict.title: File changed on disk
messages.filePanel.conflict.body: The file has been modified outside Pier. Overwrite it anyway?
messages.filePanel.errors.tooLarge: File is too large to open in the editor (>10 MB).
messages.filePanel.errors.binary: Binary files cannot be opened in the text editor.
messages.filePanel.conflict.compareUnavailable: The changed file is not readable text.
messages.filePanel.conflict.changedAgain: The file changed again before it could be overwritten.
messages.filePanel.quickOpen.title: Go to File
messages.filePanel.quickOpen.noProject: Open a project to search files.
messages.filePanel.saveOnClose.title: Do you want to save the changes made to "{{name}}"?
messages.filePanel.saveOnClose.body: Your changes will be lost if you don't save them.

pier.files.project.title: Project
pier.files.project.description: Shows the current project and opens its file tree.

pier.files.autoSave.description: Automatically save dirty files one second after the last edit. Conflicts with external changes still open the overwrite or compare dialog.
pier.files.autoSave.label: Auto save

pier.files.editor.minimap.description: Show a minimap overview on the right side of the source editor.
pier.files.editor.minimap.label: Minimap

pier.files.tree.showExcludedFiles.description: Show paths matched by the exclusion patterns below.
pier.files.tree.showExcludedFiles.label: Show excluded files

pier.files.tree.excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns excluded from the file tree when excluded files are not shown. Enter one pattern per line; blank lines and lines beginning with # are ignored.
pier.files.tree.excludePatterns.label: Exclude patterns

pier.files.tree.showGitIgnoredFiles.description: Show files and folders matched by .gitignore, .git/info/exclude and other Git ignore sources.
pier.files.tree.showGitIgnoredFiles.label: Show Git-ignored files
